content.text: Directions: You will hear a passage about {{3_passage_topic}}. It will be read twice.Retell the passage with the following given points.You will have fifty seconds to prepare and fifty seconds to retell.(你将听到一段文章。文章将读 2 遍。根据下面所给提示复述文章。你将有 50 秒的准备时间和 50 秒的复述时间)

Part Three: Retell. You will hear a dialogue about ordering dishes. It will be read twice.Retell the passage with the following given points.You will have fifty seconds to prepare and fifty seconds to retell.

gradingInfo.gradingInfo:
- 核心评分点:关键信息完整性(40%)、逻辑连贯性(30%)、语法准确性(30%)

- 考查重点:听一段 200词左右的短文(故事、通知、说明文)，抓取“who/what/when/where/why/how”核心信息，用自己的话连贯复述，不遗漏关键细节。

editableData.description: 听短文复述 - 短文主题 (you will hear a passage about...)
听短文复述 - 提示图片
